description: JVM Health — Memory, CPU, Threads, GC e recursos do S.O. (Quarkus + Micrometer)

panels.title: GC — Live Data Size vs Max
GC — Taxa de Alocação e Promoção (rate 1m)
Auth Login — Taxa por Família de Status (rate 1m)
Auth Login — Distribuição por HTTP Status (%)
Rooms — Taxa por Família de Status (rate 1m)
Rooms — RPS por Método e Endpoint

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application="meeting-room", runtime=~"$runtime", uri=~"/rooms.*"}[1m])) by (le, uri, method, runtime))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application="meeting-room", runtime=~"$runtime", uri=~"/rooms.*"}[1m])) by (le, uri, method, runtime))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application="meeting-room", runtime=~"$runtime", uri=~"/rooms.*"}[1m])) by (le, uri, method, runtime))

panels.title: Rooms — Latência por Endpoint (p50 / p95 / p99)
Rooms — Total de Chamadas por Operação (no período)
Reservations — Taxa por Família de Status (rate 1m)
Reservations — RPS por Método e Endpoint

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application="meeting-room", runtime=~"$runtime", uri=~"/reservations.*"}[1m])) by (le, uri, method, runtime))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application="meeting-room", runtime=~"$runtime", uri=~"/reservations.*"}[1m])) by (le, uri, method, runtime))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application="meeting-room", runtime=~"$runtime", uri=~"/reservations.*"}[1m])) by (le, uri, method, runtime))

panels.title: Reservations — Latência por Endpoint (p50 / p95 / p99)
Reservations — Total de Chamadas por Operação (no período)
BrasilAPI — Chamadas por Segundo (Total / Sucesso / Erro)
BrasilAPI — Tempo de Resposta (p50 / p95 / p99)
BrasilAPI — Total de Consultas por Ano (no período)
Cache de Feriados — Hit / Miss por Segundo
Cache de Feriados — Taxa de Cache Hit (últimos 5m)
🗄️ Banco de Dados — Pool de Conexões & Hibernate
Pool — Pico de Conexões vs Tamanho do Pool (B)
Pool — Ciclo de Vida das Conexões (rate 1m) (C)
Hibernate — Operações por Entidade: SELECT / INSERT / UPDATE / DELETE (F)
Hibernate — Query Plan Cache: Hit / Miss / Hit Rate (H)
Hibernate — Sessions: Abertas / Fechadas / Flushes / Conexões (I)

title: Meeting Room — JVM Health
